title: Marketplace Manager - Miniklub South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Miniklub South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Miniklub South Asia Partners:
Miniklub South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub South Asia Partners!
